ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the research topic */,
  "num_publications" INTEGER /* Total number of publications related to the topic */,
  "first_publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of the first publication */,
  "most_recent_publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of the most recent publication */,
  "average_publication_date" TEXT /* Average date of publication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the research topic */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_topics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research topic associated with the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was released */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors for the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was officially recorded */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Information on funding sources for the research */,
  "published_online_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published online */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the publication entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the publication entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the publication entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES research_topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the author */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the author entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the author entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the author entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the institution entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the institution entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the institution entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication the metric relates to */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal where the publication appeared */,
  "published_in" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the publication */,
  "altmetric_score" INTEGER /* Altmetric score of the publication */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
